title: TC-CALL-DETECT-001: Voyager 4245 Office — Active Call State Detection on App Launch (Device Connected, Call Active Before App Open)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to iOS device.
1. Place an active call on the iOS device using the headset (e.g., dial from Phone app, answer on headset).
2. Verify call is active on the headset (hear audio through headset).
3. Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe up from app switcher).
4. Relaunch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings.
6. Observe the ANC/Transparency Mode toggle and slider state.
7. Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Update (DFU).
8. Observe whether the 'Update' button is tappable or grayed out.
expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: App correctly detects active call state on Morpheus. Expected: ANC/Transparency controls are disabled/grayed out with a message 'Unavailable during a call'. DFU 'Update' button is grayed out with message 'Unavailable during a call'. Actual (If Bug): ANC/Transparency controls remain interactive, DFU button is tappable — app fails to detect call state.

title: TC-CALL-DETECT-002: Voyager 4245 Office — Call State Detection When Call Starts While App Is Open on Audio Settings Screen
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is connected. Poly Studio Mobile app is open and on Device → Audio Settings screen.
1. Observe that ANC/Transparency controls are currently interactive (no active call).
2. From a second phone, call the iOS device.
3. Answer the call on the headset (tap headset call button or phone screen).
4. Without navigating away, observe the ANC/Transparency controls on the Audio Settings screen.
5. Wait 5 seconds. Observe if controls become disabled.
6. Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Update.
7. Observe DFU button state.
expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: App detects call state transition in real-time on Morpheus. Expected: Within 2 seconds of call answer, ANC/Transparency controls become disabled/grayed out with 'Unavailable during a call'. DFU button becomes grayed out. Actual (If Bug): Controls remain interactive indefinitely — app never receives or polls for the call state change event from Morpheus.

title: TC-CALL-DETECT-003: Voyager 4245 Office — Call State Detection After App Backgrounded During Call and Then Foregrounded
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is connected.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings.
2. Place an active call on the iOS device using the headset.
3. Verify call is active.
4. Press the Home button to background the app.
5. Wait 15 seconds.
6. Reopen the app from the app switcher (do NOT force-kill).
7. Observe the ANC/Transparency controls on the Audio Settings screen.
8. Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Update. Observe DFU button state.
9. End the call.
10. Observe that ANC/Transparency controls become re-enabled.
expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: App correctly re-detects call state after background→foreground lifecycle transition on Morpheus. Expected: On foregrounding, ANC/Transparency controls are disabled with 'Unavailable during a call'. DFU button is grayed out. After call ends, controls re-enable within 2 seconds. Actual (If Bug): Controls are interactive during call after foregrounding — app lost call state during backgrounding and failed to re-query on resume.

title: TC-CALL-DETECT-004: Voyager 4245 Office — DFU Blocked During Active Call (Direct Validation)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is connected. A firmware update file is available on the iOS device.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Update.
2. Verify that the 'Update' button is tappable (no active call).
3. Press Home to background the app.
4. Place an active call on the iOS device using the headset.
5. Reopen the app from app switcher.
6. Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Update.
7. Observe the 'Update' button state.
8. Tap the 'Update' button even if it appears enabled (attempt to trigger DFU).
expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: DFU is blocked during active call on Morpheus. Expected: 'Update' button is grayed out with message 'Unavailable during a call'. Tapping does nothing. Actual (If Bug): 'Update' button is tappable and DFU proceeds — app fails to detect call state, allowing unsafe firmware update during active call.

title: TC-CALL-DETECT-005: Voyager 4245 Office — ANC/Transparency Mode Changes Blocked During Active Call (Direct Validation)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is connected.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings.
2. Set ANC level to 50 (verify slider moves).
3. Press Home to background the app.
4. Place an active call on the iOS device using the headset.
5. Reopen the app from app switcher.
6. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings.
7. Attempt to drag the ANC slider to a new value (e.g., 80).
8. Attempt to toggle Transparency Mode ON.
9. Attempt to adjust Transparency Surround level to 70.
expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: ANC/Transparency changes are blocked during active call on Morpheus. Expected: ANC slider is non-interactive (grayed out). Transparency toggle is non-interactive. All sub-sliders (Surround, Speech) are non-interactive. Message 'Unavailable during a call' is displayed. Actual (If Bug): Sliders respond to touch and values change — app fails to detect call state, allowing unsafe audio setting changes during active call.

title: TC-CALL-DETECT-006: Voyager 4245 Office — Connect Headset While Already on a Call (Bluetooth State Transition)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired but currently disconnected from the iOS device.
1. Place an active call on the iOS device using the iPhone earpiece/speaker.
2. While the call is active, power on the Voyager 4245 headset and initiate Bluetooth connection (or connect via base).
3. Wait for the headset to connect to the iOS device (hear 'connected' or see Bluetooth icon).
4. Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings.
6. Observe ANC/Transparency controls.
7. Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Update. Observe DFU button state.
8. End the call.
9. Observe that controls become re-enabled.
expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: App detects call state when Morpheus connects during an active call. Expected: ANC/Transparency controls are disabled with 'Unavailable during a call' immediately upon app opening. DFU button is grayed out. After call ends, controls re-enable. Actual (If Bug): Controls are interactive — app queried call state only at Bluetooth connection time and missed the already-active call, or never queried at all.

title: TC-CALL-DETECT-007: Voyager 4245 Office — Receive Incoming Call While on Device Settings → Audio Settings Screen
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is connected. Poly Studio Mobile app is open on Device → Audio Settings.
1. Verify ANC/Transparency controls are interactive (no active call).
2. From a second phone, call the iOS device.
3. Do NOT answer the call yet — let it ring on the headset.
4. Observe the ANC/Transparency controls while the call is ringing (incoming, not yet active).
5. Answer the call on the headset.
6. Observe the ANC/Transparency controls immediately after answer.
7. Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Update. Observe DFU button state.
8. End the call.
9. Observe controls re-enable.
expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: App detects call state transition from ringing→active on Morpheus. Expected: During ringing, controls may remain interactive (incoming call is not yet active). Within 2 seconds of answering, controls become disabled with 'Unavailable during a call'. DFU button grayed out. After call ends, controls re-enable. Actual (If Bug): Controls remain interactive after answer — app fails to detect the ringing→active transition event from Morpheus.

title: TC-CALL-DETECT-008: Voyager 4245 Office — Call State Detection Persistence Across App Navigation (Audio Settings → Back → Audio Settings)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is connected.
1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings.
2. Place an active call on the iOS device using the headset.
3. Verify ANC/Transparency controls become disabled (if bug is not present).
4. Navigate away: Tap Back to return to Device screen.
5. Navigate back: Tap Audio Settings again.
6. Observe ANC/Transparency controls.
7. Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Update. Observe DFU button.
8. Navigate back to Device screen, then back to Audio Settings again.
9. Observe controls again.
expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: Call state detection persists across navigation on Morpheus. Expected: Each time Audio Settings is entered during the active call, ANC/Transparency controls are disabled with 'Unavailable during a call'. DFU button is grayed out each time Firmware Update screen is entered. Actual (If Bug): Controls are interactive on re-entry — app only queried call state on initial screen load and lost it after navigation, or re-query returns incorrect state.

title: TC-CALL-DETECT-009: Voyager 4245 Office — Device Asymmetry: Compare Call State Detection Behavior with Voyager 4320/4220
steps: Precondition 1: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is connected to iOS device A.
Precondition 2: Voyager 4320 (or 4220) Office headset is connected to iOS device B (or same device, one at a time).
1. On iOS device A (Morpheus): Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings.
2. Place an active call on device A using the Morpheus headset.
3. Observe ANC/Transparency controls state. Record result.
4. End call.
5. On iOS device B (Voyager 4320/4220): Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings.
6. Place an active call on device B using the Voyager 4320/4220 headset.
7. Observe ANC/Transparency controls state. Record result.
8. End call.
9. Compare results between the two devices.
expected: 🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY VALIDATION: Morpheus and Voyager 4320/4220 may report call state differently. Expected: Both devices should disable ANC/Transparency controls during active call. Actual (If Bug): Voyager 4320/4220 correctly disables controls during call, but Morpheus fails to disable them — confirming device-specific call state reporting bug unique to Morpheus firmware/BLE service.

title: TC-CALL-DETECT-010: Voyager 4245 Office — Call State Detection After Phone Reboot While Headset Connected
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired to the iOS device.
1. Connect the Morpheus headset to the iOS device.
2. Reboot the iOS device (power off, then power on).
3. After reboot, unlock the device and wait for Bluetooth to reconnect automatically.
4. Verify headset is connected (Bluetooth settings or headset audio prompt).
5. Open Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings.
6. Verify controls are interactive (no active call).
7. Place an active call on the iOS device using the headset.
8. Observe ANC/Transparency controls.
9. Navigate to: Device → Device Settings → Firmware Update. Observe DFU button.
expected: 🧠 DEEP LIFECYCLE: Call state detection works correctly after phone reboot on Morpheus. Expected: ANC/Transparency controls become disabled with 'Unavailable during a call' within 2 seconds of call answer. DFU button grayed out. Actual (If Bug): Controls remain interactive — app's call state detection mechanism fails after a fresh BLE connection post-reboot, possibly due to missing service discovery or cached state.
